name: Dakahlia Governorate (Egypt)

colors.symbolism: the agricultural land of the Nile Delta and the Egyptian flag's tradition
the Damietta-branch wheat and the heritage of Mansoura
details and inscriptions of the emblem

description: A white field charged in the centre with the multi-coloured emblem of Dakahlia Governorate.
history: The flag of Dakahlia Governorate displays the governorate's coat of arms on a white field, adopted as part of the system of governorate flags introduced in the 2000s.

features.symbolism: the multi-coloured arms of Dakahlia, evoking the governorate's agricultural fertility, the Nile, and its capital city Mansoura
